Response 220035367

ASU Engineering Continues to Provide Lean Six Sigma Green Belt Certification

Community Engagement (CE) - partner provides funding or sponsorship tied to shared activity outcomes.

Activity Basics

Question

Activity Description (Short)

ASU Engineering continues to provide Lean Six Sigma Green Belt Certification training on-site at Boeing Mesa for engineers and operations employees. In FY26, an additional 18 employees completed their Six Sigma Black Belt Certification. Both cohorts presented to leadership at Boeing and were reco...
